'''gahoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamelledware|enamelledware]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamelledware|enamelledware]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gahoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæheheth|gæheheth]] || [[word:gæhehej|gæhehej]] || [[word:gæhehesh|gæhehesh]] || [[word:gæhehe|gæhehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahohohoth|gahohohoth]] || [[word:gahohohoj|gahohohoj]] || [[word:gahohohosh|gahohohosh]] || [[word:gahohoho|gahohoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahohoth|gahohoth]] || [[word:gahohoj|gahohoj]] || [[word:gahohosh|gahohosh]] || [[word:gahoho|gahoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahofhoth|gahofhoth]] || [[word:gahofhoj|gahofhoj]] || [[word:gahofhosh|gahofhosh]] || [[word:gahofhof|gahofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahohotho|gahohotho]] || [[word:gahohojo|gahohojo]] || [[word:gahohosho|gahohosho]] || [[word:gahohoko|gahohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahohoth|gahohoth]] || [[word:gahohoj|gahohoj]] || [[word:gahohosh|gahohosh]] || [[word:gahoho|gahoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahohothol|gahohothol]] || [[word:gahohojol|gahohojol]] || [[word:gahohoshol|gahohoshol]] || [[word:gahohokol|gahohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahohothotho|gahohothotho]] || [[word:gahohojojo|gahohojojo]] || [[word:gahohoshosho|gahohoshosho]] || [[word:gahohoko|gahohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahohothon|gahohothon]] || [[word:gahohojon|gahohojon]] || [[word:gahohoshon|gahohoshon]] || [[word:gahohokon|gahohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahohothoro|gahohothoro]] || [[word:gahohojoro|gahohojoro]] || [[word:gahohoshoro|gahohoshoro]] || [[word:gahohokoro|gahohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
